option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane fx:controller="controllers.amateur.EventDetailController" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"> <center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="event-detail-scroll"> <content> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="event-detail-root"> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="2.0" right="2.0" top="2.0" /> </padding>
<VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card event-detail-main-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /> </padding>
<StackPane minHeight="240.0" styleClass="event-cover-box"> <ImageView fx:id="coverImageView" fitHeight="240.0" fitWidth="680.0" preserveRatio="true" /> </StackPane>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0"> <VBox spacing="4.0"> <Label fx:id="titleLabel" styleClass="event-title" text="Titre de l'évènement" /> <HBox spacing="8.0"> <Label fx:id="typeLabel" styleClass="event-chip" text="Type" /> <Label fx:id="statusLabel" styleClass="event-chip event-chip-status" text="Statut" /> </HBox> </VBox> <StackPane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button fx:id="buyTicketButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onBuyTicketClick" styleClass="ticket-action-primary" text="Acheter ticket" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="descriptionLabel" styleClass="event-description" text="Description de l'évènement" wrapText="true" />
<GridPane hgap="18.0" vgap="8.0"> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Horaire début" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Horaire fin" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Prix d'entrée" GridPane.columnIndex="2" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Capacité" GridPane.columnIndex="3" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label fx:id="dateDebutLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="dateFinLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="priceLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value event-price-value" GridPane.columnIndex="2" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="capacityLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" GridPane.columnIndex="3" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> </GridPane>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8.0"> <Label text="Galerie:" /> <Label fx:id="galleryLabel" /> </HBox> <Label fx:id="metaLabel" styleClass="page-caption" text="Métadonnées" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="10.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card ticket-section-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="14.0" left="14.0" right="14.0" top="14.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <Label styleClass="ticket-section-title" text="Vos tickets" /> <StackPane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Label fx:id="ticketsCountLabel" styleClass="ticket-count-chip" text="0 ticket(s)" /> <Button fx:id="backButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onBackClick" styleClass="ticket-action-secondary" text="Retour" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="ticketsEmptyLabel" styleClass="page-caption" text="Aucun ticket achete pour cet evenement." /> <VBox fx:id="ticketsContainer" spacing="8.0" /> </VBox> </VBox> </content> <padding> <Insets bottom="0.0" left="0.0" right="0.0" top="0.0" /> </padding> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane styleClass="event-detail-page" fx:controller="controllers.amateur.EventDetailController" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"> <center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="event-detail-scroll"> <content> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="event-detail-root"> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="2.0" right="2.0" top="2.0" /> </padding>
<VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card event-detail-main-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /> </padding>
<StackPane minHeight="240.0" styleClass="event-cover-box event-detail-cover"> <ImageView fx:id="coverImageView" fitHeight="240.0" fitWidth="680.0" preserveRatio="true" /> </StackPane>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0" styleClass="event-detail-header"> <VBox spacing="4.0"> <Label fx:id="titleLabel" styleClass="event-title" text="Titre de l'évènement" /> <HBox spacing="8.0"> <Label fx:id="typeLabel" styleClass="event-chip" text="Type" /> <Label fx:id="statusLabel" styleClass="event-chip event-chip-status" text="Statut" /> </HBox> </VBox> <StackPane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button fx:id="buyTicketButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onBuyTicketClick" styleClass="ticket-action-primary" text="Acheter ticket" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="descriptionLabel" styleClass="event-description" text="Description de l'évènement" wrapText="true" />
<GridPane hgap="18.0" styleClass="event-detail-info-grid" vgap="8.0"> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Horaire début" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Horaire fin" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Prix d'entrée" GridPane.columnIndex="2" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Capacité" GridPane.columnIndex="3" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label fx:id="dateDebutLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="dateFinLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="priceLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value event-price-value" GridPane.columnIndex="2" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="capacityLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" GridPane.columnIndex="3" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> </GridPane>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8.0" styleClass="event-detail-gallery-row"> <Label styleClass="event-detail-label-key" text="Galerie:" /> <Label fx:id="galleryLabel" styleClass="event-detail-label-value" /> </HBox> <Label fx:id="metaLabel" styleClass="page-caption" text="Métadonnées" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="10.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card ticket-section-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="14.0" left="14.0" right="14.0" top="14.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0" styleClass="event-detail-ticket-header"> <Label styleClass="ticket-section-title" text="Vos tickets" /> <StackPane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Label fx:id="ticketsCountLabel" styleClass="ticket-count-chip" text="0 ticket(s)" /> <Button fx:id="backButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onBackClick" styleClass="ticket-action-secondary" text="Retour" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="ticketsEmptyLabel" styleClass="page-caption" text="Aucun ticket achete pour cet evenement." /> <VBox fx:id="ticketsContainer" spacing="8.0" /> </VBox> </VBox> </content> <padding> <Insets bottom="0.0" left="0.0" right="0.0" top="0.0" /> </padding> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
